zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Mello於1170年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易梅洛時，她的父親Dreux de Mello I37歲，母親Ermengarde de Toucy45歲。她於1195年與Garnier de Traynel III結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1215年享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Mello于1170年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易梅洛时，她的父亲Dreux de Mello I37岁，母亲Ermengarde de Toucy45岁。她于1195年与Garnier de Traynel III结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1215年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mello
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Adelino, Ana, Joaquin, Acacio, Claudio, Cristina, Fernando, Americo, Enrique.  Portuguese Duarte, Joaquim, Armanda, Joao, Paulo, Serafim.
Italian: probably from a short form of a personal name ending with the hypocoristic suffix -ello, such as Giacomello from Giacomo .

variants.name: Giacomo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenico, Gino, Salvatore.
Italian: from the personal name Giacomo, from Latin Jacobus via Late Latin Jacomus (see James and Jacob ).

variants.name: Melle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Otto.
Italian: habitational name from Melle in Cuneo province (Piedmont); in some cases possibly also a variant of a personal name such as   Mello   1.
Norwegian: probably a variant of   Mele  .

variants.name: Mellone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Emidio, Luigi, Pasquale.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Mello  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Mello was born in 1170, in Mello, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Dreux de Mello I, was 37 and her mother, Ermengarde de Toucy, was 45. She married Garnier de Traynel III in 1195. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1215, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Mello est née en 1170, à Mello, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Dreux de Mello I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Toucy, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Garnier de Traynel III en 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1215, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Mello 1170 in Mello, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dreux de Mello I 37 und ihre Mutter Ermengarde de Toucy 45. Sie hat 1195 Garnier de Traynel III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1215 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Mello è nata il nel 1170 nel Mello, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Dreux de Mello I, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ermengarde de Toucy, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Garnier de Traynel III nel 1195. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1215, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Melloが1170年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼメロで生まれた時，父Dreux de Mello Iは37歳，母Ermengarde de Toucyは45歳であった。1195年にGarnier de Traynel IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1215年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Mello(이)가 1170년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 멜로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dreux de Mello I(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermengarde de Toucy(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1195년 Garnier de Traynel III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1215년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Mello nasceu em 1170, em Mello, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Dreux de Mello I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Toucy, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Garnier de Traynel III em 1195. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1215, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Mello родилась в 1170 г. в местности меллоу, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Dreux de Mello I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Toucy, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Garnier de Traynel III в 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1215 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Mello nació en 1170, en Mello, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Dreux de Mello I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Toucy, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Garnier de Traynel III en 1195. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1215, a la edad de 45 años.
